backstory.original: Having watched your party's progress for many years from Limbo, the Great Githzera, Zaerith Menyar-Ag-Gith, has dispatched Nrakk to join your party on the Material Plane. Though his true motivations are unknown, Nrakk is a masterful Kensai monk whose kensei weapon Naginata is a force to be reckoned with on the battlefield. Reserved and aloof, Nrakk sometimes has a hard time interacting with those he sees as his lessers, but he nevertheless seems committed to the party's cause.
backstory.display: 伟大的吉斯泽莱人，扎里思·梅尼亚尔·阿格·吉斯，在混沌海多年观察你队伍的进展后，派遣恩拉克来到物质位面加入你的队伍。虽然他的真实动机不为人知，但恩拉克是一位技艺高超的剑圣武僧，他的剑圣武器薙刀是战场上不可忽视的力量。克制而冷漠的恩拉克，有时很难与那些被他当作下属的人交往，但他似乎对队伍的情况非常上心。

description.original: Nrakk attacks the nearest enemy with his Kensei Weapon.
description.display: 恩拉克用剑圣武器攻击距离最近的敌人。

description.original: Nrakk blasts a random enemy and gains Ki Points
description.display: 恩拉克随机轰击一名敌人并获得真气点

longDescription.original: Nrakk blasts a random enemy and gains Ki Points. Reactivate when the blue ring fills to the orange area to blast another enemy and gain additional Ki Points.
longDescription.display: 恩拉克随机轰击一名敌人并获得真气点。蓝色圆环填充到橙色区域时重新激活，轰向另一敌人并获得额外真气点。

description.desc: Nrakk increases the damage of all Champions in the columns in front of and behind him by $(amount)%.
恩拉克会使他前列和后列所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Nrakk increases the damage of some Champions near him. Place your damage deals in the column in front of or behind him to make use of this!
tipText.display: 恩拉克使自身附近部分勇士的伤害提高。将你的伤害输出勇士放在他前面或后面的一列，就能使用此效果！

description.desc: Unlocks Nrakk's Ki Blast Ultimate Attack
解锁恩拉克的“真气震爆”杀招攻击

Based on the maximum number of Ki Points Nrakk has had at one time during this adventure, Way of the Kensei is increased by $(amount)% for each of those Ki Points, stacking multiplicatively. Nrakk can have at most 60 Ki Points at once.
根据本次冒险中恩拉克单次拥有过的真气点最大数量，每个真气点使剑圣之道的伤害提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。恩拉克可同时拥有最多 60 真气点。

effect_keys.stack_title: 最大值此次冒险中的真气点

description.desc: When Nrakk has at least 1 Ki Point before he attacks, consume 1 Ki Point and stun all enemies Nrakk hits for $(stun_time) seconds. Affected enemies take $(not_buffed amount)% more damage for each Ki Point Nrakk currently has, stacking multiplicatively. This debuff does not stack and lasts until the affected enemy is killed or Nrakk has no Ki Points remaining.
如果恩拉克在攻击前至少带有 1 个真气点，他将吞噬这 1 个真气点，使他命中的所有敌人眩晕 $(stun_time) 秒。恩拉克当前拥有的每个真气点都会使受影响的敌人受到的伤害增加 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。该减益不叠加，持续到受影响敌人被击杀或恩拉克没有剩余真气点为止。

tipText.original: Nrakk gains Ki Points from his ultimate ability and uses them to greatly impact his contributions to the formation.
tipText.display: 恩拉克从他的杀招技能中获得真气点，并将其用于在帮助阵型方面发挥重大影响。

description.desc: Every third attack, Nrakk cleaves multiple enemies dealing damage in an area.
每三次攻击，恩拉克就会劈砍多名敌人，造成范围伤害。
Increases the potency of most Positional Formation Abilities of adjacent Champions with a Wisdom (WIS) score of 14 or higher by $(amount)%.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Increases the potency of $target's Positional Formation Abilities by $amount%

description.desc: 使感知大于等于 14 的相邻勇士的大部分位置阵型技能效果提高 $(amount)%。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 使$target的位置阵型技能效果提高 $amount%

specializationDescription.original: Nrakk advises adjacent Champions with high Wisdom in order to make their positional formation abilities more effective.
specializationDescription.display: 恩拉克为高感知的相邻勇士提供建议，使其位置阵型技能更有效。

description.desc: Increases the potency of most Positional Formation Abilities of adjacent Champions with a Dexterity (DEX) score of 16 or higher by $(amount)%.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Increases the potency of $target's Positional Formation Abilities by $amount%

description.desc: 使敏捷大于等于 16 的相邻勇士的大部分位置阵型技能效果提高 $(amount)%。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 使$target的位置阵型技能效果提高 $amount%

specializationDescription.original: Nrakk trains adjacent Champions with high Dexterity to make their positional formation abilities more effective.
specializationDescription.display: 恩拉克为高敏捷的相邻勇士提供训练，使其位置阵型技能更有效。

description.desc: While Nrakk has no Ki Points he reduces his ultimate cooldown by $(cooldown_reduction) second each time he attacks, and an additional $(cooldown_reduction_boss) seconds each time he hits a boss creature.
当恩拉克没有真气点时，他每次攻击都会使自己的杀招冷却时间缩短 $(cooldown_reduction) 秒，并且每次命中首领生物会额外缩短 $(cooldown_reduction_boss) 秒。
Increases the effect of Nrakk's specializations by $(amount)%.
使恩拉克的专精效果提高 $(amount)%。

description.original: I was sent here to assist, and assist I shall.
description.display: 我是被派来这里帮忙的，我会帮忙的。

description.original: Together we shall defeat the illithid threat once and for all!
description.display: 我们将共同作战，彻底消除灵吸怪的威胁！

description.original: I'll give the signal -- just as we practiced.
description.display: 我来发信号——就像练习时那样。

description.original: I can't say I've trained ten people for one attack before...
description.display: 我以前可能没有训练过十个人发起一次进攻……

description.original: There is no solution through rage.
A perfect strike is nothing without a perfect defense.
description.display: 完美的攻击离不开完美的防守。

description.original: Never let your opponent know your next move.
description.display: 永远不要让对手知道你的下一步行动。

description.original: In Gith's name, you will meet your end.
description.display: 以吉斯的名义，你将迎来终点。

description.original: They said it would be fine...
I am smarter than even your most brilliant material plane citizen.
description.display: 我比你们物质界位面最聪明的公民更聪明。

description.original: Some have called my battle meditations... calming to watch.
description.display: 有些人称我的战斗为冥想......看着就能平静下来。

description.original: The churning chaos of Limbo has sharpened my will.
description.display: 混沌海翻腾的混乱磨砺了我的意志。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount% and Nrakk's ultimate now hits once and sets his Ki Points to 15 without any mini-game

description.original: I am one with the multiverse.
description.display: 我与多元宇宙是一体的。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount% and Nrakk's ultimate now hits once and sets his Ki Points to 30 without any mini-game

description.original: Mind, heart, body, and soul in perfect balance, as all things should be.
description.display: 心灵、情感、身体和灵魂达到完美平衡，一切本该如此。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Having watched your party's progress for many years from Limbo, the Great Githzera, Zaerith Menyar-Ag-Gith, has dispatched Nrakk to join your party on the Material Plane. Though his true motivations are unknown, Nrakk is a masterful Kensai monk whose kensei weapon Naginata is a force to be reckoned with on the battlefield. Reserved and aloof, Nrakk sometimes has a hard time interacting with those he sees as his lessers, but he nevertheless seems committed to the party's cause.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Nrakk is a powerful damage dealer who can stun, cleave, and deal bonus damage. He can be customized via his spec to deal with smaller or larger groups of enemies.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 伟大的吉斯泽莱人，扎里思·梅尼亚尔·阿格·吉斯，在混沌海多年观察你队伍的进展后，派遣恩拉克来到物质位面加入你的队伍。虽然他的真实动机不为人知，但恩拉克是一位技艺高超的剑圣武僧，他的剑圣武器薙刀是战场上不可忽视的力量。克制而冷漠的恩拉克，有时很难与那些被他当作下属的人交往，但他似乎对队伍的情况非常上心。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 恩拉克是一位强大的伤害输出者，能够击晕、顺劈并造成额外伤害。他能够通过专精进行自定义，从而对小型或大型群体敌人造成伤害。
